tool.name: scan_cluster
tool.description: Run a full security scan on the connected Kubernetes cluster. Checks for RBAC misconfigurations, Pod Security Standards violations, missing NetworkPolicies, and insecure secret management.

parameters.parameter: The kubeconfig context to use. Defaults to current context.

tool.name: check_rbac
tool.description: Check for dangerous RBAC permissions in a specific namespace. Detects wildcard permissions, cluster-admin abuse, and risky role bindings.

tool.name: check_pod_security
tool.description: Audit pods against Pod Security Standards (PSS). Finds privileged containers, host namespace usage, and capability issues.
